description: Collapse a decision point (BL-70): choose the winning alternative. The Decision moves to `accepted`, the losing alternatives are superseded (OBSOLETES — retired on the record, not deleted), and the outcome is written into the Decision's own `alternatives` field with the rationale. This records the choice; merge the winner's design content into the baseline separately with apply_merge.

note.description: Why — recorded in the Decision's alternatives field with the outcome.

name: collapse_decision
